vault.label: W1
vault.notes: Idle, non-trading. Receives 50% of every realized profitable exit.

trading_wallets.label: W8
trading_wallets.notes: Copies W9's entries (the historically stronger performer: +6.26 SOL / 51% WR vs W8's own -9.65 SOL / 42% WR). Falls back to its own independent 0.70-gate scan only when W9 has nothing open to mirror. Each entry is tagged mirror_w9 or independent so the Pattern Optimizer can compare the two approaches over time.
